note: Curve StableSwap-NG plain factory pools (mainnet). One shared implementation ABI (snapshot) → N pool addresses (addresses[], factory multi-address mode). Each pool is called DIRECTLY by users. coins per pool are baked into the per-pool manifests by the generator. Pools: 2btc (WBTC/tBTC), frxeth-ng (WETH/frxETH), crvusdfrax (FRAX/crvUSD).

0x3df02124.name: exchange
0x3df02124.reason: user swap: coin i -> coin j (pool-coin indices resolved to token addresses via the per-pool baked coins value-map)

0x0c3e4b54.name: add_liquidity(+receiver)
0x0c3e4b54.reason: user provides liquidity with explicit receiver

0x5b36389c.name: remove_liquidity
0x5b36389c.reason: user burns LP for proportional underlying

0x1a4d01d2.name: remove_liquidity_one_coin
0x1a4d01d2.reason: user burns LP for a single coin i (PooledBurnOneCoin, Tier 3)

0xe3103273.name: remove_liquidity_imbalance
0xe3103273.reason: user withdraws exact per-coin amounts, capped LP burn (PooledBurnImbalance, Tier 3)

0x095ea7b3.name: approve
0x095ea7b3.reason: standard ERC20 on the pool-as-LP-token — analyzed by the erc20 standard adapter (register the pool in tokens/<chain>/ as erc20 to auto-enumerate); not a Curve-specific surface. The permission grant IS covered, just by the generic adapter, so the §3 red-flag is satisfied in substance.

0xd505accf.name: permit
0xd505accf.reason: EIP-2612 permit on the LP token — same as approve: covered by the erc20 standard adapter, not Curve-specific.

0xa9059cbb.name: transfer
0xa9059cbb.reason: standard ERC20 LP transfer — erc20 standard adapter.

0x23b872dd.name: transferFrom
0x23b872dd.reason: standard ERC20 LP transferFrom — erc20 standard adapter.

0xa461b3c8.name: initialize
0xa461b3c8.reason: factory-only one-time init (proxy bootstrap); not a user-wallet action.

0x30c54085.name: withdraw_admin_fees
0x30c54085.reason: keeper/admin — sweep accrued admin fees; not a user-wallet position action.
